chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 34 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case (Notice issued) 27.05.2019 Mr. Jalal-ul-Din M. Akbar Chandio, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General for the State. .-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The applicant by way of instant Criminal Transfer Application u/s 526 Cr.P.C has sought for transfer of his case from the learned Additional Sessions Judge, Mirwah to any other competent Court of law having jurisdiction at Khairpur mainly for the reason that he and his witnesses are apprehending danger to their lives at the hands of the accused while attending the learned trial Court at Mirwah. On being asked, in what manner the applicant and his witnesses are apprehending danger to their lives while attending learned trial Court at Mirwah? No satisfactory reply to it was furnished either by the applicant or by his learned counsel. In these circumstances, the conclusion which could be drawn would be that no logical justification is available with the applicant to get his case transferred from the Court of learned Additional Sessions Judge, Mirwah to any other Court at Khairpur. Consequently, the instant Criminal Transfer Application is dismissed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
